title: Is J.M. Smucker's Stock a Sweet Buy for Income Investors?

title: Trouble Brews for Starbucks Competitors With Shift to at-Home Coffee
text: As consumers are increasingly having their morning cup of joe at home, according to The J.M. Smucker Company, major coffeehouse chains — especially those without the devoted following of a category giant such as Starbucks — may have a rough go of it soon.

title: Investors Go Cold on Food Stocks
text: As consumers start to feel stretched, price increases pushed through by packaged-food companies like Campbell Soup and J.M. Smucker might not stick.

title: Markets Rise Modestly as Semiconductor and Regional Bank Stocks Gain
text: Markets rose modestly on Tuesday, June 6, 2023, as semiconductor and regional bank stocks gained.

title: Smucker (SJM) Q4 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates

title: Smucker (SJM) Tops Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Smucker (SJM) came out with quarterly earnings of $2.64 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.42 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.23 per share a year ago.

title: J.M. Smucker stock gains after adjusted profit, sales rise above expectations, with growth in all 3 business segments
text: Shares of J.M. Smucker Co. SJM, -0.01% rose 0.7% in premarket trading Tuesday, after the company with food brands including Folgers, Dunkin', Smuckers and Meow Mix beat fiscal fourth-quarter earnings expectations.

title: KHC or SJM: Which Is the Better Value Stock Right Now?

title: Factors to Watch Ahead of The J.M. Smucker's (SJM) Q4 Earnings
